grant_title: BioPath Program by Texas Medical Center Innovation Factory
geographic_restrictions: Primarily Houston, Texas, with potential expansion to surrounding areas in Texas
project_area: Biomanufacturing workforce development, STEM education, and life sciences career pathways
demographic_requirements: Open to all students, with emphasis on underrepresented groups in STEM fields to increase diversity in the biotech workforce
eligibility_summary: The BioPath program is designed for high school and community college students interested in biomanufacturing and life sciences careers. It provides exposure, training, mentorship, and certification pathways to prepare participants for entry-level roles in the biotech industry. Educators, families, and community organizations are also encouraged to engage to support workforce development efforts.
